description: PM Superpowers behavior regression cases. These cases define routing, blocking, handoff, launch, and PM method skill passthrough contracts that must remain represented in plugin references and skills.

cases.user_prompt: 老板说我们也要做一个 AI 助手，帮我写 PRD。
cases.expected_behavior: The plugin should route to intake or discovery first, separate assumptions from evidence, and not produce an engineering-ready PRD.

contains: If the request lacks product context
route to `pm-intake-triage`
If the request is too vague, route to `pm-intake-triage`.
Do not produce a PRD
Block when target user, problem, or decision is unknown.
Do not produce a PRD until the problem gate passes

cases.user_prompt: 客户说一定要 Excel 导出，销售也说很重要，帮我排进路线图。
cases.expected_behavior: The plugin should classify evidence, recover the underlying user problem, and avoid treating the requested solution as a committed roadmap item without frequency or severity evidence.

contains: Separate solution requests from underlying user problems.
Block when feedback has no source, no user segment, or no evidence of frequency/severity
Do not convert user quotes into broad user needs unless a pattern is shown.
Treat stakeholder preference as Opinion

cases.user_prompt: 这份 PRD 没写验收标准，但能不能先交给研发开做？
cases.expected_behavior: The plugin should run gate or downstream readiness and mark engineering handoff blocked when scope or acceptance criteria are missing.

contains: Do not mark engineering ready without acceptance criteria and scope.
Carry open questions forward instead of hiding them.
acceptance criteria
The handoff asks UI or engineering to build without scope, states, or acceptance criteria.
Acceptance criteria
需要 PM 补充

cases.user_prompt: 功能明天上线，但还没有监控和回滚方案，帮我做上线计划。
cases.expected_behavior: The plugin should run launch readiness and block or carry named risk when monitoring or rollback is missing.

contains: Identify risks and rollback plan.
Block when launch scope, target users, release owner, or monitoring plan is missing.
回滚方案
监控方式

cases.user_prompt: 直接用 market-sizing 帮我估算这个市场规模，不要先套完整 PM Superpowers 场景流程。
cases.expected_behavior: The plugin should allow direct use of the named PM method skill. It should only add gate or downstream checks if the output becomes a roadmap commitment, PRD, handoff, or launch decision.

contains: PM method skills 直通契约
用户明确点名某个底层方法技能
不强制套完整场景工作流
PM method skills 直通契约
只在输出要变成 PRD、路线图承诺、UI/研发交接或上线计划时
